summary: VibeSDK UI redesign iteration 2 testing completed successfully. All new features tested: auth flows (registration/login with CSRF), GitHub dialog, Fork dialog, model selector, no Cloudflare logo/Register button/deploy banner. Backend APIs (11 tests) and frontend UI (15+ checks) all passed.
test_credentials: Test users created during testing: test_{timestamp}@vibesdk.com with password TestPass123!
seed_data_creation: None - test users created dynamically during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: VibeSDK UI redesign complete. Preview URL: https://prompt-studio-103.preview.emergentagent.com. All features verified: (1) Homepage with 'What should we build today?' heading and 'Message Agent...' placeholder, (2) No Cloudflare logo, Register button, or deploy banner, (3) Sign In button opens modal with email/password and 'Don't have an account? Sign up' link, (4) Registration form has name/email/password/confirm fields, (5) After login user avatar shows initials with green dot, (6) GitHub dialog has repo name/description/private checkbox/Connect GitHub button, (7) Fork dialog has App ID input and Fork Project button, (8) Model selector shows E-1 Lite, E-1.5 Standard, E-2 Ultra options, (9) Attach button supports multiple files, (10) Voice button shows 'coming soon' toast, (11) Send button disabled when empty, enabled with text, (12) Theme toggle works (Light/Dark/System). Auth requires CSRF token from /api/auth/csrf-token.
